reviewWorkflowPolicy.findingWriteRule: Claude Code records review, inspection, and security findings in the findings file instead of implementing by default.
reviewWorkflowPolicy.securityReviewRule: Claude Code must include security review for changed code and configuration, focusing on auth, permissions, secrets, injection, unsafe IO/network/database use, dependencies, CI/CD, and infrastructure defaults relevant to the task.
reviewWorkflowPolicy.codexReadRequirement: Codex must read the findings file before automation implementation work.
reviewWorkflowPolicy.codexPriorityRule: Codex fixes or otherwise resolves active Claude Code review and security findings before other implementation tasks unless the user explicitly overrides the priority.

commitPolicy.subjectPolicy: Use a concise imperative subject that describes the single purpose of the commit.
commitPolicy.historyPolicy: All commits on published project branches must follow this format before push. When owner-approved history repair is required, rewrite only commit messages and preserve original author and committer dates.
